title: Null Pointer Exception during Login
description: Application crashes when a user clicks Login without a valid session.
resolution: Added null check before accessing user object.

title: Database Connection Timeout
description: The application cannot establish a connection to the MySQL database after multiple retries.
resolution: Increased timeout and optimized database connection pool.

title: File Upload Failure
description: Uploading files larger than 10MB results in an Internal Server Error.
resolution: Increased upload size limit and added exception handling.

title: Memory Leak in Background Service
description: Memory usage continuously increases after running scheduled tasks for several hours.
resolution: Released unused objects and optimized cache cleanup.

title: API Returns 500 Error
description: REST API returns HTTP 500 when invalid JSON payload is submitted.
resolution: Added input validation before processing request.

title: Duplicate User Registration
description: Users can register multiple accounts using the same email address.
resolution: Added unique constraint on email field.

title: Password Reset Email Not Sent
description: Password reset emails are not delivered due to SMTP authentication failure.
resolution: Updated SMTP credentials and retry mechanism.

title: Application Slow During Search
description: Search response time exceeds 20 seconds for large datasets.

title: 404 Error on Dashboard
description: Dashboard page returns HTTP 404 after deployment.

title: Session Expires Immediately
description: User session expires immediately after successful login.

title: Payment Gateway Failure
description: Transactions fail while processing online payments.
resolution: Added retry mechanism and optimized gateway timeout.

title: CSV Export Generates Empty File
description: CSV export completes successfully but downloaded file is empty.

title: High CPU Usage
description: CPU utilization reaches 100% during report generation.

title: Missing CSS After Deployment
description: Application UI loads without CSS after deployment.

title: JWT Token Validation Failed
description: JWT tokens become invalid after server restart.

title: Redis Cache Not Updating
description: Updated records are not reflected because cache remains stale.

title: Kafka Consumer Stops Processing
description: Consumer stops receiving messages after broker restart.

title: Docker Container Crash
description: Container exits immediately after deployment.

title: Permission Denied Error
description: Users with Admin role cannot access the settings page.

title: Email Notifications Sent Twice
description: Duplicate emails are generated for each notification.
